data.Name: Drogon - Schedule Risk Assessment (SRA) DG2
data.Description: Schedule Risk Assessment for the Drogon field development DG2 Concept Select gate. Monte Carlo schedule analysis (1000 iterations) covering subsea installation, FPSO conversion, drilling campaign, and commissioning timeline. P50 first oil June 2028, P90 first oil March 2029. Key risk drivers: FPSO drydock slot availability, subsea template fabrication (18-month lead), and drilling rig market.

data.Name: Drogon - Cost Risk Assessment (CRA) DG2
data.Description: Cost Risk Assessment for the Drogon field development DG2 Concept Select gate. Probabilistic cost estimate (1000 iterations) covering subsea CAPEX, FPSO conversion, drilling (12+2 contingent wells), and project management. P50 total CAPEX 8,500 MNOK; P90 10,400 MNOK. Main cost drivers: drilling duration uncertainty (12–16 wells depending on compartmentalisation), FPSO water treatment module scope, and steel/fabrication market prices.

data.Name: Drogon - Plan for Development and Operation (PDO) DG2 Draft
data.Description: Draft PDO for the Drogon DG2 Concept Select gate. Covers field description, selected development concept (subsea tie-back to FPSO, 2×4-slot templates, 12 wells), preliminary environmental impact assessment, well planning, production forecasts, and regulatory framework alignment with PSA and MPE requirements. Basis for DG3 FEED scope definition.

data.Name: Drogon - Petroleum Technology Report (PTR) DG2
data.Description: Petroleum Technology Report for DG2 Concept Select. Covers seismic interpretation, petrophysical evaluation, geomodelling (50 FMU realisations), dynamic simulation (base + 4 sensitivities), volumetric uncertainty (P10/P50/P90 STOIIP and recoverable), production forecasting (20-year profile), and recovery factor analysis across 7 Valysar segments. 285 pages.
